clips.title: Rooftop Reload
clips.prompt: Shot on 35mm anamorphic film, oval bokeh, horizontal blue lens flares, rich grain, epic widescreen. Night. A rain-soaked rooftop above a neon skyline. A person in a tactical coat slams a fresh magazine into a pistol and pivots into cover behind an AC unit as sparks fly off metal nearby. Muzzle flashes reflecting in puddles, spent casings, drifting smoke. Hard neon rim light. Deliberate cinematic motion, 24fps.

clips.title: Temple Duel
clips.prompt: Shot on 35mm anamorphic film, oval bokeh, horizontal lens flares, rich grain, epic widescreen. Dawn. A misty mountaintop temple courtyard with stone lanterns and falling cherry blossoms. Two martial artists face off; the foreground person in a flowing gi launches into a spinning kick, robes snapping, dust kicking up. Swirling petals, a distant gong, soft god-rays. Cool dawn light. Deliberate cinematic motion, 24fps.

Warm harsh daylight. Deliberate cinematic motion, 24fps.
